7:["$","article",null,{"className":"prose prose-zinc max-w-none","children":[["$","header",null,{"className":"mb-8 not-prose","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-3xl font-bold mb-2","children":"Engineering an AI Quant Trading System from Scratch"}],["$","time",null,{"className":"text-sm text-muted-foreground","children":"February 14, 2026"}]]}],[["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Building a quantitative trading system that can compete in modern markets requires solving problems across multiple domains: low-latency systems, machine learning, risk management, and regulatory compliance."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"This post outlines the architecture of the system I built over the past year."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"System Overview"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"The architecture follows a microservices pattern with strict separation of concerns:"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"className":"bg-muted p-4 rounded-lg overflow-x-auto mb-4","children":["$","code",null,{"className":"bg-muted px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono","children":"┌─────────────┐     ┌─────────────┐     ┌─────────────┐\n│ Data Ingest │────▶│   Signal    │────▶│   Risk      │\n│   (Rust)    │     │   Engine    │     │  Engine     │\n└─────────────┘     │  (Python)   │     │   (Rust)    │\n                    └─────────────┘     └──────┬──────┘\n                                               │\n                        ┌──────────────────────┘\n                        ▼\n                 ┌─────────────┐\n                 │  Execution  │\n                 │   (Rust)    │\n                 └─────────────┘\n"}]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Data Ingestion Layer"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Market data arrives via multicast UDP at microsecond granularity. The ingestion service is written in Rust for zero-allocation parsing:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Packet capture"}],": Kernel bypass using DPDK"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Parsing"}],": Zero-copy deserialization with ",["$","code",null,{"className":"bg-muted px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono","children":"serde"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Distribution"}],": Lock-free ring buffers to downstream consumers"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"The target latency for the full tick-to-signal pipeline is under 5 microseconds."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Signal Generation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"The signal engine uses a ensemble of models:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"className":"list-decimal pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Microstructure models"}],": Predict short-term price movements using order book dynamics"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Factor models"}],": Classical alpha factors (momentum, mean reversion, etc.)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Deep learning"}],": Transformer-based models for longer-horizon predictions"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Model predictions are combined using a learned stacking layer trained with reinforcement learning on realized PnL rather than supervised labels."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Risk Management"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Risk checks happen at multiple levels:"}],"\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14"]]}]
10:["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Pre-trade"}],": Position limits, concentration limits, drawdown limits"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Intra-trade"}],": Real-time VaR calculations"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Post-trade"}],": PnL attribution and strategy performance"]}],"\n"]}]
11:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"The risk engine runs in the same process as execution to avoid cross-process latency, but uses formal verification to ensure correctness of the risk calculation code."}]
12:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Lessons Learned"}]
13:["$","ol",null,{"className":"list-decimal pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Latency matters, but not always"}],": For strategies holding positions for hours, a few milliseconds of latency is irrelevant. Optimize for the right metric."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Simulation ≠ Reality"}],": Backtests are useful for catching bugs, but the only way to validate a strategy is small-scale live trading."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Risk first"}],": A strategy that makes money but could blow up is worthless. The risk system must be bulletproof before any live trading."]}],"\n"]}],"\n"]}]
14:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"The system is now live and managing $50M in assets. It's been profitable for 8 consecutive months, but I'm acutely aware that the next market regime change will be the real test."}]
